name: Make It So
description: An SDLC control plane that puts the builder in command of an agent crew.

configPath.description: Path to the Make It So YAML configuration

openclawExecutable.description: Optional OpenClaw executable path; when omitted, Make It So discovers the host installation.

numberOneAgent.description: OpenClaw agent used for initial Number One planning handoffs

numberOneModel.description: Strategist model used for initial Number One planning handoffs

numberOneThinking.description: Thinking level used for initial Number One planning handoffs

discordRouteAliases.description: Optional friendly aliases for routes OpenClaw discovers automatically

installSchedules.description: Allow the operator to install the two plugin-owned Gateway cron jobs
